project.name: RevCore
project.description: Modular Unity game development framework — 9 independent UPM packages providing foundation utilities, inspector attributes, timers, object pooling, preferences, data persistence, audio management, UI components, and editor tools.

nodes.name: RevCore.Foundation
nodes.summary: Core utilities: event bus, logger, result types, BigNumber, SerializableDictionary, ServiceLocator

nodes.name: RevCore.Inspector
nodes.summary: 14 custom inspector attributes and property drawers for Unity Editor

nodes.name: RevCore.Timer
nodes.summary: Timer scheduler, countdown, condition timers, debounce, Unity MonoBehaviour drivers

nodes.name: RevCore.Pool
nodes.summary: Generic object pooling with auto-return, warm-up, and timer integration

nodes.name: RevCore.Prefs
nodes.summary: Typed PlayerPrefs and EditorPrefs wrappers with batched save

nodes.name: RevCore.Data
nodes.summary: JObjectDB V2 JSON persistence system with model collections and auto-save

nodes.name: RevCore.Audio
nodes.summary: Audio clip repository, SFX pooling, music playback, volume fading, Addressables support

nodes.name: RevCore.UI
nodes.summary: UI components: buttons, toggles, scrollviews, panel stack, layout, joystick

nodes.name: RevCore.Tools
nodes.summary: Standalone editor tools: hub window, asset cleaner, scene navigator, finders

layers.name: Foundation Layer
layers.description: Core utilities with zero dependencies — event bus, logger, result types, BigNumber, delegates, ServiceLocator. All other packages depend on this.

layers.name: Inspector Layer
layers.description: Custom inspector attributes and property drawers. Zero dependencies — enhances Unity Editor experience.

layers.name: Core Services Layer
layers.description: Mid-level packages that depend only on Foundation: Timer (scheduling), Prefs (typed PlayerPrefs/EditorPrefs), Pool (object pooling).

layers.name: Domain Services Layer
layers.description: Higher-level packages with multiple dependencies: Audio (clip management, SFX pooling), Data (JSON persistence), UI (buttons, panels, scrollviews).

layers.name: Editor Tools Layer
layers.description: Standalone editor tools with zero RevCore dependencies. Hub window, asset cleaner, finders, scene navigator.

layers.name: Test Layer
layers.description: NUnit test assemblies across all packages. 116 tests in 21 files.

layers.name: Package Configuration Layer
layers.description: UPM package manifests, assembly definitions, documentation files.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: RevCore is a modular Unity framework split into 9 independent UPM packages. Start with the Foundation README to understand the architecture and dependency graph.

tour.title: Foundation — The Leaf Package
tour.description: Foundation provides core utilities: EventBus for decoupled communication, Result<T> for error handling, BigNumber for large values, ServiceLocator for DI, and common delegates/helpers. Every other package depends on this.

tour.title: Event Bus & Service Locator
tour.description: The event bus enables publish/subscribe without direct references. ServiceLocator provides a lightweight DI container. Both are key Foundation APIs used throughout RevCore.

tour.title: Inspector Attributes
tour.description: 14 custom attributes (ReadOnly, Button, Separator, MinMax, etc.) with corresponding property drawers. Zero dependencies — enhances any Unity project's Inspector experience.

tour.title: Timer System
tour.description: Core scheduling: TimerScheduler manages handles, CountdownTimer/ConditionTimer/TimedAction for different patterns. GlobalTimers and SceneTimers provide Unity MonoBehaviour drivers.

tour.title: Object Pooling
tour.description: Generic RevPool<T> with auto-return, warm-up count, and integration with Timer for timed despawns. PoolsContainer manages multiple pools.

tour.title: Preferences Wrappers
tour.description: Typed PlayerPrefs (bool, int, float, string) with dirty tracking and batched save. EditorPrefs variants for editor-only settings. Container pattern for bulk operations.

tour.title: Data Persistence — JObjectDB
tour.description: JObjectDB V2: JSON-backed persistence with model collections, auto-save with debounce, and dependency injection via [Inject] attribute. Uses Newtonsoft JSON.

tour.title: Audio System
tour.description: AudioCollection ScriptableObject for clip management, BaseAudioManager for volume/SFX pooling/music fading, SfxSource for per-object SFX. Optional Addressables support via #if ADDRESSABLES.

tour.title: UI Components
tour.description: Full UI toolkit: JustButton/JustToggle with rich animations, PanelStack for navigation, OptimizedScrollView for virtualized lists, HoledLayerMask, Joystick, layout aligners.

tour.title: Editor Tools Hub
tour.description: Standalone editor tools with zero RevCore dependencies. RevCoreToolsWindow discovers tools via reflection. 12 tools across 6 categories: Navigate, Search, Generators, UI Tools, Utility, Addressables.

tour.title: Testing Patterns
tour.description: NUnit tests via Unity Test Framework. 116 tests across all packages. Test asmdefs use overrideReferences + nunit.framework.dll. EditMode tests with [Test] and [TestCase] attributes.
